summary: Reviewed CORE-199 spec and implementation contract for real-run query and evidence entry points.
reviewed_validation_summary: pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test; pnpm --filter @webenvoy/api-server test; pnpm --filter @webenvoy/schemas test; pnpm conformance; pnpm typecheck; git diff --check; loom fact-chain --target . --json; loom verify --target . --json; loom suite validate --target . --item CORE-199 --json; loom suite carrier validate --target . --item CORE-199 --json; loom suite evidence validate --target . --item CORE-199 --json; loom build --target . --item CORE-199 --build-evidence .loom/specs/CORE-199/build-evidence.json --json passed locally on 2026-07-06 UTC; PR #214 metadata readback/preflight passed; hosted py-compile, demo-bootstrap, repo-local-cli and loom-check passed; merge gate is pending current-head review.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Spec scope matches Stage 5 real-run query needs and preserves refs-only boundaries for private runtime material.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The implementation contract lists the expected Core/API/schema/conformance ownership and verification without expanding to App UI, live account operation, or write-side behavior.
